title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services, including case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home supports or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 1610 Woods Court Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a US citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 386-2620 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-2620 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help you through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records for all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Heights off 13th and Pacific Avenues Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY
